update.message: Please update to the latest version to continue using the app.

settings.title: Settings
settings.overlayWindowDesc: Show on screen when app is in background

onboarding.step2Desc: We're glad you're here. This app is designed to make your experience simple and enjoyable. Let's get you set up in just a few steps.
onboarding.step3Desc: Pick a color and mode that suits your style.

androidModules.title: Android Modules
androidModules.homeWidgetDesc: A native Android widget you can add to your home screen. Control the counter directly without opening the app.
androidModules.homeWidgetFeature1: Increment / decrement from the home screen
androidModules.homeWidgetFeature3: Automatic sync with the floating overlay
androidModules.overlayDesc: A draggable control window that stays on screen while the app is in the background. Control the counter while using other apps.
androidModules.overlayFeature4: Direct button to open the app
androidModules.permissionDesc: Required system permission for the floating overlay
androidModules.permissionGranted: Permission granted — the floating overlay will appear automatically when the app goes to the background.
androidModules.infoNote: These modules are written entirely in native Kotlin. No third-party packages required.
androidModules.notSupportedDesc: These modules are specific to the Android platform.
